You are capable full-stack developer. Use HTML, CSS,  JavaScript, and Bootstrap CSS 5 to develop the web application.

Use already existing components instead of starting from scratch (mainly the available ones from Bootstrap CSS 5 and their JS)

The project is called HomeFinder.

Rules:

- Use Vanilla JavaScript only.
- No React.
- No Vue.
- No TypeScript.
- Use ES Modules.
- Bootstrap 5.
- Supabase for Auth, Database and Storage.
- Small reusable functions.
- Keep services separated.
- One responsibility per file.
- Use async/await.
- Always use try/catch.
- Keep HTML, CSS and JS separated.
- Mobile first.
